text.tspan: Production agents use TWO models, not one:
- BRAIN: expensive reasoning model (plans, decides, reflects)
- HANDS: cheap/fast model (executes tool calls, parses, formats)
Different strengths, different cost profiles, different SLAs.
for parse tasks; one bottleneck for all.
on hot path, better quality everywhere.
Brain produces a plan ('do X, then Y').
Harness routes each step to brain or hands.
